title: LRC - JUIT
content: Research/Academic Writing Tools QuillBot (https://quillbot.com) : QuillBot is a versatile AI-powered writing assistant that can significantly support the writing of research projects and publications. Its features are tailored to enhance the quality, clarity, and efficiency of academic and professional writing. Who Can Access? QillBot is accessible only for the registered Research Scholars, PG Students, Faculty and Staff Members of the JUIT. One needs to fill out the ‘‘QuillBot Access Request Form’ using JUITSOLAN email only. Those who have not filled out the QuillBot Access Request Form may not be able to access the tool. QuillBot user helps guides and tutorials: User Manual: QuillBot – User Manual Demo Videos: Paraphraser - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8_Xfp6liyoc Grammar Checker - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kJmkdy9yKYA Summarizer - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Eq6fGoxL6U0 Citation Generator - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xy5HhXm3PJo Translator - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1I6rW28D1Vo Tutorials: Comprehensive QuillBot tutorials are available at: https://help.quillbot.com/hc/en-us/categories/13344535512215-Tutorials-How-to-Use
